shipping.title: Shipping
shipping.intro: We deliver across mainland Spain in 2–4 business days. Free shipping on orders over €100.

sections.heading: Delivery times
sections.body: Mainland Spain: 2–4 business days. Balearic Islands, Canary Islands and rest of EU: 4–7 business days. Orders are prepared Monday to Friday.

sections.heading: Rates
sections.body: Standard shipping: €8. Free on orders over €100. You will receive a tracking number by email as soon as your order leaves our Madrid warehouse.

sections.heading: Tracking
sections.body: Check your order status under Account → Orders. For help, email hello@mavile.com.

returns.title: Returns
returns.intro: You have 30 days from delivery to return any unworn item.

sections.heading: How to return
sections.body: Start a return from Account → Orders. Pack the item with its original tags and drop off at any collection point.

sections.heading: Refunds
sections.body: We process refunds within 5–7 business days after receiving the item. The amount is credited to your original payment method.

sections.heading: Exceptions
sections.body: For hygiene reasons, we cannot accept returns on underwear, swimwear or personalised items. Sale items may have specific conditions noted on the product page.

size-guide.title: Size guide
size-guide.intro: Our garments follow a contemporary fit. If you are between sizes, we recommend sizing up.

sections.heading: Tops
sections.body: XS (34–36), S (36–38), M (38–40), L (40–42), XL (42–44). Shirts and knits have ease through the shoulders and chest.

sections.heading: Trousers
sections.body: Waist sizes 34–44. Standard inseam is 78 cm for women and 82 cm for men. See product pages for detailed measurements.

sections.heading: Footwear
sections.body: EU sizes 36–45. Our leather shoes soften slightly with wear. If between sizes, choose the smaller for a snugger fit.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: We are here to help with orders, sizing and any questions about Mavile.

sections.heading: Customer care
sections.body: Email: hello@mavile.com · Phone: +34 910 000 000 · Hours: Monday–Friday, 9:00–18:00 (CET).

sections.heading: Stores
sections.body: Madrid — Calle Serrano 45 · Lisbon — Rua do Século 12 · Paris — Rue de Rivoli 88. Visit by appointment.

sections.heading: Press & partnerships
sections.body: For media and partnerships: press@mavile.com

our-story.title: Our story
our-story.intro: Mavile was born in Madrid with a simple idea: timeless, well-made clothing for everyday life.

sections.heading: Origins
sections.body: Founded in 2018, Mavile combines European design with responsible production in Portugal and Italy. Each collection is built on essential pieces that outlast the season.

sections.heading: Philosophy
sections.body: Modern. Clean. Wearable. We believe in fewer garments, better made. No loud logos — noble materials and cuts that move with you.

sections.heading: Today
sections.body: We operate online and in three cities — Madrid, Lisbon and Paris — with a design, sourcing and customer care team united by one obsession: quality without compromise.

materials.title: Materials
materials.intro: We select fibres and fabrics for feel, durability and traceable origin.

sections.heading: Natural fibres
sections.body: Italian virgin wool, Belgian linen, organic cotton and Mongolian cashmere. We prioritise renewable fibres with OEKO-TEX or GOTS certifications where available.

sections.heading: Leather
sections.body: Vegetable-tanned leather for shoes, belts and bags. We work with certified tanneries in Italy and Spain that reduce chrome use.

sections.heading: Care
sections.body: Every product includes washing and care instructions. Good care extends a garment's life — the most sustainable way to dress.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.intro: The best garment is the one you already own. We design for longevity.

sections.heading: Production
sections.body: We manufacture in small batches to avoid overstock. Over 80% of production takes place in Portugal and Italy, reducing logistics footprint.

sections.heading: Packaging
sections.body: Recycled cardboard boxes with no plastic inside. Shipping bags are reusable and padding is kraft paper.

sections.heading: Commitment
sections.body: We publish an annual impact report with measurable goals: CO₂ reduction, supplier traceability and garment repair programmes.

press.title: Press
press.intro: Resources for media, editors and collaborators.

sections.heading: Press kit
sections.body: Download logos, campaign imagery and press notes by emailing press@mavile.com. We respond within 48 business hours.

sections.heading: Recent coverage
sections.body: Mavile has been featured in Vogue España, Monocle and The Gentlewoman for its minimalist approach and quality materials.

sections.heading: Interviews
sections.body: For interviews with the creative team or workshop visits, contact our communications department.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: In compliance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and applicable data protection law, we inform you about how we process your personal data.

sections.heading: Data controller
sections.body: Marcel Carrillo Huerta, with tax ID 25733447N, registered address at Calle Roberto Olid, n.º 5, CP 29631, Benalmádena, Málaga (Spain) and contact email komabones@gmail.com.

sections.heading: Data we collect
sections.body: We collect identification and contact details (name, email address, shipping address), browsing data (technical and analytics cookies) and payment data managed directly by Stripe. Mavile does not store card payment data.

sections.heading: Purposes and legal basis
sections.body: Order and shipping management (contract performance — Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR). Transactional and account communications (legitimate interest — Art. 6(1)(f)). Marketing communications with explicit consent (Art. 6(1)(a)). Compliance with legal obligations (Art. 6(1)(c)).

sections.heading: Retention periods
sections.body: Order data is retained for the period required to fulfil contractual and fiscal obligations (minimum 5 years under Spanish tax law). Marketing data is retained until you withdraw consent.

sections.heading: Recipients
sections.body: Your data may be shared with logistics and shipping providers for order fulfilment, with Stripe for payment processing, and with technology service providers. We do not sell your data to third parties.

sections.heading: International transfers
sections.body: Stripe, Inc. (USA) acts as a data processor under Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission, ensuring an adequate level of protection.

sections.heading: Your rights
sections.body: You may exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction and portability by writing to komabones@gmail.com with a copy of your identity document. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (www.aepd.es).

sections.heading: Cookies
sections.body: This website uses technically necessary cookies for its operation and analytics cookies to measure usage. You can manage your cookie preferences at any time via the notice at the bottom of any page, or by clicking "Cookie settings" in the footer.

legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.intro: In compliance with Article 10 of Spain's Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce Act (LSSI-CE), the following identifying information is provided.

sections.heading: Company details
sections.body: Name: Marcel Carrillo Huerta. Tax ID (DNI): 25733447N. Address: Calle Roberto Olid, n.º 5, CP 29631, Benalmádena, Málaga, Spain. Email: komabones@gmail.com.

sections.heading: Registry information
sections.body: Marcel Carrillo Huerta operates as a sole trader (autónomo). IAE business activity code: to be completed.

sections.heading: Purpose and terms of use
sections.body: This website facilitates the online sale of women's fashion and accessories. Accessing and using this site implies acceptance of these terms. The owner reserves the right to modify them at any time.

sections.heading: Intellectual and industrial property
sections.body: All content on this website (texts, images, designs, logos and source code) is owned by Marcel Carrillo Huerta or its licensors and is protected by Spanish and international intellectual property law. Reproduction, distribution or public communication without express authorisation is prohibited.

sections.heading: Liability
sections.body: The owner accepts no liability for damages arising from improper use of the website, service interruptions due to technical causes beyond its control, or the content of third-party sites linked from this website.

sections.heading: Governing law
sections.body: These terms are governed by Spanish law. For the resolution of disputes, the parties submit to the courts of the consumer's place of residence, in accordance with applicable consumer protection legislation.
